overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dense cyberpunk urban environment. The journey begins in a narrow graffiti-covered alley, transitions through neon-lit commercial passages, ascends stairs to street level, passes an NCPD police car, and ends in a transit station with moving trains visible through glass walls. The scene features strong midday sunlight mixed with vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow descending alley with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs through a narrow graffiti-covered alleyway

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with metal railings
wall covered in green and red graffiti tags
illuminated billboard featuring a person's face

segments.scene_description: The video begins descending a narrow concrete stairwell in a cyberpunk urban environment. Graffiti covers the left wall while industrial structures loom overhead. A large illuminated billboard is visible at the bottom of the descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with neon signs and street vendors

events.description: exits stairwell into wider commercial alley with neon signage and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley passing by NPCs and food stalls on either side

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on a bench conversing

entered.detail: food vending machine with illuminated display
street food cart with bottles and containers
traditional red lanterns hanging between buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow commercial alley lined with neon signs and vending machines. Two NPCs sit on a bench to the left while red lanterns hang overhead. The camera moves forward past food carts and various cyberpunk advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending between industrial buildings

events.description: begins ascending long concrete staircase with orange railings
reaches top of stairs and emerges onto street level

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs with orange railings, approaching street level

entered.detail: long concrete staircase with orange metal handrails
cyan neon arrow sign pointing left

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long concrete staircase with orange railings between industrial walls. Sunlight becomes stronger as the camera approaches street level, where a neon directional sign and steam vents become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection under elevated highways

events.description: passes parked NCPD police car on the right side of the street
crosses street and continues under elevated overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along urban street, passing police car and crossing intersections under overpasses

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked on street with holographic side display

entered.detail: NCPD police car with blue holographic side displays
elevated highway structure casting shadows on street
yellow and white painted crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a sunlit urban street under massive overpasses. An NCPD police car is parked on the right. The camera passes the vehicle and continues along the sidewalk, crossing intersections marked with yellow crosswalk lines while surrounded by dense commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station corridor with glass walls showing passing trains

events.description: enters transit station with large glass walls and moving train visible outside

agents.ego_description: walking through transit station corridor alongside glass walls with train passing outside

entered.detail: large glass panels showing train tracks outside with colorful reflections
transit train moving past outside the glass wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into an enclosed transit station corridor with large glass walls. A train moves past outside, visible through the glass with colorful neon reflections. The camera walks alongside the glass wall, passing a green ticket machine on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that descends from a gritty industrial underbelly into a bright, high-tech urban transit hub. It begins by descending a narrow concrete stairwell flanked by graffiti and looming industrial structures, moving toward a glowing billboard at the base. As the camera enters a narrow commercial alley, the environment shifts into a dense corridor of neon signs, red lanterns, and vending machines before turning back upward along a long staircase with orange railings. The scene then opens onto a sun-drenched street under massive overpasses, passing a parked NCPD police car and crossing yellow-marked intersections amidst towering commercial buildings. Finally, the camera transitions into an enclosed transit station, gliding alongside large glass walls where a moving train flashes by in a blur of colorful neon reflections.
